entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content:
Hi,

I added, but i can´t add the Source Month into the copy rule, only the target month.

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Release News 2408 – External Entities
entry.content:
@ali-kaplan @JPT Link to ABAP Keyword Documentation about External Entities was now added. 

ABAP CDS - External Entities | ABAP Keyword Documentation

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content: Please check the parameter configuration for sourceMonth - e.g. Cardinality needs to be set to "Single".

entry.title: Re: Parental Leave Ireland Solution Proposal in SuccessFactors Time Management
entry.content: Very inspirational and applicable across the Globe. Thank you so much for your insights guys! Kind regards, Anna

entry.title: SAP Datasphere: BW Series – Getting Started (Part 2)
entry.content:
This is the second part of the BW series. The first part, covering text and language dependency, navigation and transitive attributes, time-dependency, currency conversion and hierarchy with Business Content, can be accessed here: SAP Blogs | SAP Datasphere: BW Series – Getting Started (Part 1).

 

Introduction

This blog serves the purpose to help new customers to successfully onboard to SAP Datasphere. It should especially be addressed to customers who are used to the SAP Business Warehouse (SAP BW) environment and are now starting to work in SAP Datasphere. E.g. as a BW developer, I know how to create an InfoObject and select the respective settings for hierarchies, texts, language-dependency etc. How would I do that natively in SAP Datasphere? This video series will answer these questions and covers the native implementation in SAP Datasphere.

 

Demo Series Overview

InfoObjects

Hierarchy with Directory


There are some cases where you have to manually create a hierarchy in SAP BW. Therefore, in this video, I will show you an end-to-end process on how you can leverage hierarchies in SAP Datasphere, specifically hierarchies with directory. A hierarchy directory would list all hierarchies in a given context. For more information, please refer to SAP Help | Create a Hierarchy with Directory. Please note that you can also create a hierarchy without directory (see SAP Help | Add a Hierarchy to a Dimension).

 

Advanced DataStore Objects

Transformation Flow & Local Tables


Advanced DataStore objects (aDSO) are common in SAP BW/4HANA to store and consolidate data. In this video, I will show you the equivalent use case when loading data with a transformation into a Standard aDSO with Change Log. For that, we will leverage a delta-enabled local table (e.g. as a target entity in a Replication Flow) in a Transformation Flow for data transformation, and write the result into a different delta-enabled target table. For more information, please see SAP Help | Capturing Delta Changes in Your Local Table and SAP Help | Creating a Transformation Flow. 

 

Queries

Analytic Model - Key Figures


In SAP BW, you can define a variety of different key figures in a BW query such as calculated or restricted key figures. In SAP Datasphere you have the same capabilities within the Analytic Model. In this video, I will showcase the creation of calculated measures with and without an exception aggregation, and restricted measures. For more information, please see SAP Help | Create a Calculated Measure and SAP Help | Create a Restricted Measure. Please note that you can also create a count distinct measure which is not covered in this video (see SAP Help | Create a Count Distinct Measure).

Analytic Model - Variables & Derivations


BW developers are heavily implementing exit variables in BW queries to provide e.g. dynamic filtering options for data analysis. In SAP Datasphere, we can leverage derivations in the Analytic Model to achieve an equivalent solution. Hence, in this video, I will show you how to implement variables with derived values. the For more information, please refer to SAP Help | Create a Standard Variable, SAP Help | Derived Variables and SAP Help | Create an Input Parameter).

 

Conclusion

In this blog, we started with SAP BW objects and showed an equivalent solution in SAP Datasphere in accordance to the SAP BW functionality. Apart from the capabilities shown, SAP Datasphere offers even more features such as the Data Marketplace, Catalog and data integration of SAP and non-SAP solutions to enable the Business Data Fabric.

Please note that the detailed outlining of the respective capabilities in SAP Datasphere can also be automatically imported via the Import Entities option if you have an SAP BW/4HANA or BW Bridge in place (please see SAP Help | Importing Data Models from SAP BW).

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content: Here are all requirements towards parameters in copy rules: Type: Member Model: Default Model (NAME) Dimension: Date Cardinality: Single Allow "All Members": Deselected

entry.title: Re: Customer data browser authorization error
entry.content:
looks like you are missing an auth object, there are few things you can do.

1 - ensure you have generated the role after catalog is added

2 - check SU53 see if there is a auth error

3 - check gateway error log, ensure you dont have any error there.

Cheers,
Ren

entry.title: Re: Customer data browser authorization error
entry.content: Alas I can't do anything you said. Or at least not to that extent. I have Public Cloud. I am "privileged".

entry.title: Re: Customer data browser authorization error
entry.content: I could only try to activate a trace similar to the SU53, but it served me good just once since I started playing with this version of SAP. I'll do it nevetheless and let you know

entry.title: RSTRAN532 after activating the Transformation
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to specify the following formula for the transformation in SAP HANA (eclipse): '"' & RIGHT ( 8; COSTCENTER ) & '"'

After saving the formula I get the following error message:

Rule (target field: KTG_HELY_FOGADO group: 01 Standard group): syntactic error in the formula

Message number: RSTRAN532

Procedure for system management

Internal rule ID 9

What could be wrong?
Thank you!

entry.title: Problems with SQL Server Statistics.
entry.content:
Dear experts.

We have some programs (Z) making high costing accesess to some tables, related with this, for some tables we create new statistics in a daily basis (MSEG, PRPS and so on..) the problem is that some days (not always) those programs degradate drastrically and we need to re-create statistics in order to recover normal performance.

The question we want to ask is that any of you have had this behaviour before and found (or know) any reason for it.

Could you please give us some hint about this (strange) issue?.

Hope you could help us.

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content: it worked thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: Workzone Header toolbar functions not working
entry.content: We have the same issue since this week. Any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: Automatic HU WT create within storage control
entry.content:
#embedded EWM, SAP Release 2022#
Hello, i need some help with this and i cant find any blog for the answer of my question:

I created an inbound process with quality inspection.
1. Manual HU creation
2. Goods receipt
3. Automatic WT creation to quality workspace (PPF) -> storage process step QIS, system creates automatically a HU Warehouse task
4. Confirming WT 
5. After Inspection, decision triggers follow-up-action -> stock type changes to blocked in putaway automatically 
6. Automatic WT with process type 1020 to a specifiy storage type with sequence  for putaway -> here is my problem/question, system creates a product WT, why? 

Screenshot shows the first WT after 3030 process(line 3), that's what system created automatically. There is no distribution to my storage process step and it isnt a HU WT.

Line 4 is what i created manually with transaction /SCWM/ADHU and here system distributed right steps. 
My guess is that i need a hu task instead of a product task. Am i right? 
But why does the system create a product task?

I checked all customizing and everything seems fine, maybe someone could give me advice.
Warehouse type 1020:

POSC:

Log shows one hu task creation, triggerd manually by me and one product task from system. But i cant see anything suspicious.

thank you very much in advance!

entry.title: Re: Deploying Features based on User Stories in Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi @Sharath_vuppula 

We received your request and are in the process of evaluating the problem.
Please allow for a delay in our response.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How Minimum, Total shelf life works !!
entry.content:
Hello,

If we want in some cases reduce the total shelf life during a good receipt, do you know the configuration required for the system to not overwrites with the total shelf life?

entry.title: SAP CodeJam Request (Istanbul, Turkey)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

 

I hope you are all doing well.

 

I am planning to organize a CodeJam event in the first and second quarters of 2025. For the first quarter, I am particularly interested in the topic “Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core.” I am considering scheduling it for late February or early March, depending on your availability. The event will be hosted at the NTT Data Business Solutions Turkey Istanbul office. I have also emailed sapcodejam@sap.com to discuss the details.

Kind Regards,

Hilal Kurt

entry.title: Re: Using Azure Private Virtual Network Endpoints with SAP Datasphere Replication
entry.content:
Hi Jon,

unfortunatly in our case the Datasphere run at AWS and the MS Databrick is hosted at Azure and is only available via private vlan. Therefore we can not use what you show here. But I have a question.

Is there a possibility to realize the connection via an SAP Open Connector? We have these licensed as we are using the SAP Integration Suite which has acces to the company internal network via the SAP HANA Cloud Connector.

Best regards,

Mark

entry.title: Infusing AI into Journal Entry Process - Beyond Automation
entry.content:
Background:

During critical periods such as month-end, quarter-end, or year-end close, organizations often face a high volume of manual journal entries being posted into their S/4  systems. These entries can sometimes contain errors, especially when they are entered by various users who might not have a consistent understanding of the required formats, values, or related documentation.

Currently, these manual entries are posted directly into the system without prior checks, leading to potential discrepancies, accounting errors, or compliance violations. These errors could include incorrect amounts, incorrect GL codes, misaligned descriptions, missing or inaccurate supporting documentation, and others. To mitigate this risk, a more streamlined and controlled process is needed where the journal entries are parked first, reviewed for validation, and then posted after being confirmed as correct.

Key Issues:

  1. Manual Journal Entry Errors: These include issues such as:
    • Incorrect amounts posted for a particular entry type (e.g., a cost that is typically $5,000 being entered as $500).
    • Incorrect General Ledger (GL) codes or descriptions (e.g., the GL code does not match the standard or policy documentation).
    • Missing or incorrect attachment references (e.g., an invoice or supporting document is either not attached or is attached to the wrong entry).
    • Missing or incomplete information (e.g., missing approval, insufficient details for audit).
  2. Lack of Validation Prior to Posting: Since the journal entries are directly posted into the system, there is no opportunity to detect these errors before they are committed to the books, leading to potential audit issues, compliance risks, and manual corrections that are costly and time-consuming.

Solution Objective: To streamline this process, the goal is to implement a system where all manual journal entries are first "parked" (held temporarily) in the system, rather than posted immediately. During this parked state, the entries can undergo a series of automated checks or validations, leveraging historical data, company policy documents, and attachments to ensure accuracy and compliance. The system can then generate alerts or notifications to flag any anomalies, providing users with the opportunity to correct them before final posting.

Key Components: A Symphony of Technology

SAP BTP AI Services

Leverage pre-built AI models for document analysis, text extraction, and machine learning. These services enable intelligent data processing and automation.

S/4HANA

The core ERP system provides access to real-time financial data, enabling accurate and efficient journal entry creation and posting.

Data Pipelines

Securely transport data between BTP AI and S/4HANA, ensuring smooth and reliable integration of processed data for journal entries.

AI-Enabled Validation System:

An AI-enabled solution would help in detecting these anomalies by analyzing historical data, policy documents, and attachment details. The AI system would focus on the following validation areas:

  1. Amount Validation:
    • Historical Amount Comparison: AI can learn typical amounts for certain types of journal entries based on historical data. For example, if a specific type of entry (e.g., payroll) typically has an amount in the range of $4,500 to $5,500, the system can flag entries that are too high or too low.
    • Amount Consistency: Cross-checking the amounts with similar entries from previous periods or other business units to ensure consistency.
  2. GL Code Validation:
    • GL Code Matching: Ensuring that the correct GL code is used based on the entry type. If an entry for "supplies" is posted under a GL code used for "payroll", it can be flagged.
    • GL Code Description Match: The AI can validate that the description associated with the GL code aligns with the standard naming convention or description used in the policy documents.
    • Cross-checking with Financial Policies: Validation against internal financial policies or specific rules regarding what types of entries can use which GL codes.
  3. Description Validation:
    • Attachment Match: The AI can compare the GL description with the content of the attached document to ensure they are consistent. For example, if the entry refers to "Consulting Fees" but the attachment shows "Travel Expenses", the system can flag this discrepancy.
    • Standard Description Check: Ensuring that entries match the standard descriptions specified in internal accounting guidelines or corporate documentation.
  4. Attachment Validation:
    • Document Existence Check: Ensuring that required documents (e.g., invoices, contracts, receipts) are attached. If they are missing, an alert is generated.
    • Attachment Type Matching: The system can check whether the correct type of attachment is associated with the entry. For example, if the entry refers to a "Vendor Payment," the attached document can be an invoice or a vendor agreement.
    • Document Consistency: Comparing the details in the attachment (e.g., amounts, dates) with the amounts or other details in the journal entry to verify consistency.
  5. Approval Workflow Validation:
    • Approval Matching: Ensuring that all journal entries have been approved according to the organization’s internal controls. The AI can validate whether the appropriate manager or department head has provided the necessary approval for the entry type.
    • Approval Policy Check: Cross-checking entries against approval thresholds defined by the organization (e.g., entries above $10,000 must have senior management approval).
  6. Data Completeness:
    • Missing Information: Identifying any missing or incomplete fields in the journal entry. For example, ensuring that the "reason for entry" field or "cost center" field is populated.
    • Consistency with Historical Data: Cross-checking the current entry against similar entries in historical data to ensure that the same fields are populated appropriately.
  7. Audit & Compliance Validation:
    • Regulatory Compliance: Validating that the journal entry complies with relevant accounting regulations (e.g., GAAP, IFRS). The AI system can cross-check entries for common non-compliance patterns.
    • Audit Trail: Ensuring that there is a clear and complete audit trail for all parked journal entries, including details on who made the entry, when it was parked, and who approved it.
 

 

 

Solution Approach

  1. AI and Machine Learning Models:
    • Use machine learning algorithms that can be trained on historical data, previous journal entries, and standard accounting practices to recognize patterns of typical errors and anomalies.
    • The system can apply supervised learning techniques, using labeled data (e.g., previous correct and incorrect journal entries), to improve accuracy over time.
  2. Natural Language Processing (NLP):
    • To validate descriptions, attachment content, and other free-form text fields, NLP techniques can be applied to identify mismatches between the journal entry and the attached documentation.
  3. Integration with S/4  Systems:
    • The solution can seamlessly integrate with existing S/4  or accounting systems to "park" the journal entries and raise alerts automatically when discrepancies are found.
  4. Automated Alerts and Notifications:
    • Once anomalies are detected, the system can send automated alerts to relevant personnel (accountants, managers, auditors) with clear descriptions of the issue and suggested corrections.

Key Benefits

  • Improved Accuracy: By automating the validation of manual entries before posting, the AI system can significantly reduce the likelihood of errors.
  • Cost and Time Savings: Automating the review and validation process saves time and money that would otherwise be spent on manual corrections and audits.
  • Compliance and Risk Mitigation: Ensures that all entries comply with financial regulations and internal policies, reducing the risk of non-compliance and potential penalties.
  • Audit Readiness: The system maintains a comprehensive log of all validation checks, providing a clear audit trail for future reviews.

Type of Journal Entry

Description

S/4HANA AI Automation

Standard Entries

Monthly accruals for expenses like utilities or salaries.

S/4HANA uses AI to predict and automate recurring standard entries based on historical data, improving efficiency and accuracy.

Recurring Entries

Lease payments or subscription fees that occur regularly.

AI algorithms in S/4HANA identify patterns and automate the setup and posting of recurring entries, reducing manual intervention.

Adjusting Entries

Year-end adjustments for prepaid expenses or inventory changes.

S/4HANA's AI capabilities assist in suggesting necessary adjustments and automate postings based on predefined rules and criteria.

Accrual Entries

Accruing unpaid invoices for services received but not yet billed.

AI in S/4HANA predicts and accrues expenses and revenues, ensuring timely recognition and minimal manual oversight.

Reclassification Entries

Reclassifying expenses from one department to another.

AI tools help automate reclassifications by analyzing transaction data and suggesting necessary reallocations.

Tax-related Entries

Journal entries related to tax provisions or deferred tax liabilities.

S/4HANA utilizes AI to ensure tax compliance by automating complex calculations and adjustment entries according to tax laws.

Adjustments for Errors

Correcting a previously recorded entry due to misclassification or numerical error.

AI-driven error detection and correction features in S/4HANA help identify discrepancies and propose corrections efficiently.

 

In conclusion, implementing an AI-powered validation system for parked manual journal entries will streamline the accounting process, reduce errors, ensure compliance, and save significant time and effort during month-end, quarter-end, and year-end closing periods.

Srinath Ganesan

entry.title: Re: Customer data browser authorization error
entry.content: I've activated the trace and run the app. Nothing. The system logs that I access the app and that I pass through a specific auth object "CDB_OBJGRP_NAM_COL_ROW". The values inside that object are all empty ("No value"). But I explicitely opted to give unrestricted access to every single field of that auth object, so it should not be that the problem. Honestly I think that that object is not the responsible of the auth error because in the trace I don't see an auth error but simply a filter applied. I don't think the system is logging the error I've told you I have.

entry.title: Re: Automatic HU WT create within storage control
entry.content:
Hi 

Please try by ticking as below for this concerned warehouse process type

Also would like to know as you mentioned that  /SCWM/ADHU is created product task. Please check once again because  /SCWM/ADHU is for HU task only.  /SCWM/ADProd is for product task.  If above suggestion does not work then I would request you to give step by step process for  /SCWM/ADHU.

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: CER006-Cloud Certification
entry.content:
Hi Margit, I have purchased a 6 attempt exam subscription. I have already taken 2 different exams and passed. Now I want to take the assessment for my first certification. But when I select the "Take assessment" link I get a message "Taking a Stay Certified assessment requires a valid subscription."

My learning hub subscription is already expired, but I still have 4 attempts available. I would like to take the assessment with these available attempts.

entry.title: Re: Unlocking Possibilities: Extending Fiori Elements Apps with the Flexible Programming Model
entry.content:
I had a requirement to change an input field into a StepInput field. Out of the box FE it is not possible, but if I understand you correctly, by pointing in the manifest.json the correct field in the table and assigning it to a custom fragment, you can do anything you like, right?

We have a service to put products into a shopping basket. If you click on the product name, it should filter out all products belonging to that category. Ordering products that are in stock via a StepInput is also a nice way to do.

Going to try this out, thanks for sharing this information! Kudo received!

entry.title: Re: Problems with SQL Server Statistics.
entry.content:
Compare the execution plans to find out where the degradation occurs. 
Please check if the right trace flags are set for your MSSQL version, check SAP note 1660220 - Microsoft SQL Server: Common misconceptions - SAP for Me
More info here: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sql/relational-databases/statistics/statistics?view=sql-server-ver16

entry.title: Re: disp+work, Dispatcher, GRAY, Stopped - SAP S/4HANA 2021 FPS02 Fully-Activated Appliance
entry.content:
Hi there,

I have the same issue. My SAP Instance was working fine, after a restart, I could not restart the dispatch service no matter what I did.
I receive the following error:

Thu Dec 5 11:29:06:836 2024 *** WARNING => DpWpCheck: status of W0 is WP_KILLED [dpxxwp.c 486] *** ERROR => DpHdlDeadWp: W0 (pid 214580) died (severity=0, status=65280, action=) [dpxxwp.c 1549] DpTraceWpStatus: W0 (pid=214580) exited with exit code 255 ***LOG Q4G=> DpTraceWpStatus, Process terminated () [dpxxwp.c 3606]

********** SERVER SNAPSHOT 1 (Reason: Workprocess 0 died / Time: Thu Dec 5 11:29:06 2024) - begin **********

SNAPSHOT_META_INFO: SECTION: ,INCLUDE_FILES: ,INCLUDE_COMPLETE_FILES: ,

INCLUDE_COMPLETE_FILES: dev_w0

Last status: W0 (pid=214580) exited with exit code 255

Server sapserver1_KCS_00, Thu Dec 5 11:29:06 2024

SAP Kernel 793 PL101
ABAP Version:
Server status: Server in state STARTING


SECTION: Last Error Information

Time: Thu Dec 5 11:28:58 2024
Description: service 'sapdp9988' unknown
Details: NiPGetServByName: 'sapdp9988' not found
Component: NI (network interface)
Location:

 

I would appreciate a lot if you could point me to the right direction. @JoergWolf 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Fiori and ADFS did only work with a refresh F5 button...
entry.content: Go to sicf => external Alias => /fiori => edit => Tab Logon Data => scroll down to Logon Procedure => set saml logon to 1. => save

entry.title: Allow calls from SAP system to SAP CPI based on the environment (SAP system DEV -> SAP CPI DEV)
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have a requirement where the calls from SAP or any other external system to SAP CPI should only be allowed based on the environment (SAP DEV system able to make call to SAP CPI DEV system only). I have already gone through the below blog post. But the below blog post uses a script inside an iflow to restrict calls based on source IP address. But, I don't want the request to not reach SAP CPI itself.

IP Allowlisting in SAP Cloud Integration

Is there any configuration that can be done at SAP BTP side to achieve this?. Really appreciate for your support.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Azeem Abdullah K.

entry.title: How to add exception handling in SAP HANA CURSOR.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing an issue in cursor . It keep running and doesn't break even though there bad data.

Is there any way to add any exceptions handling .

Scenario - We are constructing Child - parent relationship and doing self join on a table with Parent and child as join,  However when Parent and Child are same , It is going in infinite loop and procedure keep running.

We are thinking to add some exception handling within cursor loop as cursor doesn break or fail even though there is bad data.

Please let us know if you have some suggestion 

Thanks

Ajinkya Patil

entry.title: Re: Talent Intelligence HUB: Impact on Career Worksheet
entry.content: @ujjal @DP4 @rsrthieme - Hope you are doing good.

entry.title: Re: SAP not running, disp+work, Dispatcher, GRAY, Stopped, , , 7670
entry.content: Hi there, I have the same issue. My SAP Instance was working fine, after a restart, I could not restart the dispatch service no matter what I did. I receive the following error: Thu Dec 5 11:29:06:836 2024 *** WARNING => DpWpCheck: status of W0 is WP_KILLED [dpxxwp.c 486] *** ERROR => DpHdlDeadWp: W0 (pid 214580) died (severity=0, status=65280, action=) [dpxxwp.c 1549] DpTraceWpStatus: W0 (pid=214580) exited with exit code 255 ***LOG Q4G=> DpTraceWpStatus, Process terminated () [dpxxwp.c 3606] ********** SERVER SNAPSHOT 1 (Reason: Workprocess 0 died / Time: Thu Dec 5 11:29:06 2024) - begin ********** SNAPSHOT_META_INFO: SECTION: ,INCLUDE_FILES: ,INCLUDE_COMPLETE_FILES: , INCLUDE_COMPLETE_FILES: dev_w0 Last status: W0 (pid=214580) exited with exit code 255 Server sapserver1_KCS_00, Thu Dec 5 11:29:06 2024 SAP Kernel 793 PL101 ABAP Version: Server status: Server in state STARTING SECTION: Last Error Information Time: Thu Dec 5 11:28:58 2024 Description: service 'sapdp9988' unknown Details: NiPGetServByName: 'sapdp9988' not found Component: NI (network interface) Location: I would appreciate a lot if you could point me to the right direction. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Automatic HU WT create within storage control
entry.content: @MohdRashid I already tried this, but system still creates a product warehouse task.

entry.title: Re: CER006-Cloud Certification
entry.content:
Hi @AxI 
In order to provide individual support please create a case in our SAP Learning Support system 

To help the support team to understand your query better, could you please provide the following information in your correspondence?

  •            Detailed description of the issue
  •            Screenshots: To help us visualize the issue
  •            Please also provide the Course Code of course.

Kind regards,
Margit

entry.title: Seeking Guidance to learn SAP Build Work zone, SBPA
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am currently supporting one business site created with BWZ. To be frank, supporting means I don't know how they developed the application and how its working in the background.

Since I interested in learning Build work zone, I started learning my self. I started with SAP BTP basics and created BTP Trail account. I started creating Sites in my trail account by following the courses available in learning.sap.com.

I am following the course and creating sites and I am also practicing with SBPA(I read one blog where they are sending approver the notification for order confirmation). Real challenge came into the place. I am learning and implementing what I am learning but I am feeling something is missing. I don't feel complete even though I am implementing my learning.

Several question are in my mind always, How they are connecting this business site to other applications(I know this can achieve through SAP CPI ie.. API's Cloud connector etc.. we have these tools.)

How the created site is working for different clients, how they are including their customized logos, their preferred URL's.

I really what to know whether I am missing any basic knowledge, What are the concepts I need to learn to become professional developer in SAP Build Work zone. Simply, what are the whole things I need to learn  to implement business requirement as a Business Site. 

I really appreciate your time and your advice. 

Thanks a lot in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 TB report BP display filtered by GL Accounts
entry.content:
I managed to get their current (ending) balance by bringing up Debit/Credit (LC) field and summarize by Totals and sort by BP Account, and set Yes to Order and Summary

Unfortunately, it doesn't show the OB. I think you'll need a bespoken report for this.

entry.title: Save the Date for Our Exclusive SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!
entry.content:
GROW with SAP is a comprehensive package combining solutions, services, community support, and learnings to help businesses of all sizes successfully adopt cloud ERP. At its core lies SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, our fully-fledged cloud ERP designed to optimize processes and drive intelligent, sustainable operations.  

 

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Early Release Series is a biannual event showcasing live sessions led by product experts. These sessions provide an exclusive preview of upcoming innovations, including AI-driven features and advancements with Joule, tailored to selected lines of business and industries. 

Spanning several days, the series offers expert demos, insider previews, and real-time Q&A, giving participants a first look at exciting updates and the opportunity to get their questions answered directly.

From January 21 to January 24, 2025, we'll start the year with 21 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you.

Save the date and stay tuned for the detailed agenda!

An active SAP Learning Hub license is required to register for the live sessions and to consume the recordings. Find out how to sign up​

  • As a customer:​ Access to at least the SAP Enterprise Support Edition is required. Follow these steps to sign up:​
  1. Navigate to the sign-up page and click on the “sign up” button.​
  2. Authenticate yourself with your S-user ID and password.​
  3. The system will check your eligibility, create a new SAP Learning Hub user, and populate your learning catalogue. This process may take up to 2 hours.​
  4. You will receive a registration confirmation via e-mail once the registration process is complete.​
  • As a partner: Partners can access the live sessions and recordings through the SAP Partner Edge Edition.​
    ​
  • As an SAP internal: Register here for the SAP Learning Hub Internal Edition (free of charge) by clicking on “access”. ​

Experiencing issues? Make sure to be logged on before registering. In case of any other issues, reach out to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Live Product Expert Sessions.

entry.title: Re: S4/Service: Service Contract: Billing plan does not appear at position item
entry.content: Hi ,facing the same issue, did you find a solution for this? The solution suggested is not working for me

entry.title: Re: Time off Story report data access for manager - Targe...
entry.content:
Hello Avinash, Thank you so much for your response. I just want to know if scope filter in dataset will also limit the data view at story report admin user.? I believe it does.. So in this case, we may need to create a copy of report and then add scope filter for Manager specifically. 

Kindly suggest.

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content:
Can i do the same with Advanced formulas? @thomas_beck

 

I want to calculate Vencimento Base for the target month and version, using values from the source version and source month. The parameters for the calculation are the same: SourceVersion, TargetVersion, SourceMonth, and TargetMonth. Do you have a solution?

entry.title: Re: CER006 exam attempts payment instructions
entry.content: Same question what to do next. I am not able to book the exam. Very thankful, if get assistance pll.

entry.title: Re: Column editable on Fiori Element List report
entry.content:
Hi @Chamdeep557 ,

Nice blog that I have been checking for a scenario like this by using list report template. Usually we have to go with freestyle or mass edit options. When I tried to extend the controller, I am not able to get the view details or table details (even from debugging). Could you please share some detailed info on how we can get the details and complete code as the screenshot is cropped.

Thank you.

entry.title: Multiple License Types Assigned Through Business Role Not Displayed for User Under User Subscription
entry.content:
Why do all users under the User Subscription display only one license type category, even though an employee has been assigned multiple license types?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Multiple License Types Assigned Through Business Role...
entry.content: As per standard system behavior, only the highest license type is displayed in the User Subscription. For example, if an employee has both a Standard Enterprise User license and a Project Management license, the system will only show the Standard Enterprise User license, as it is has highest Licensed Users.

entry.title: Migration of service contracts/customer projects with Revenue Recognition
entry.content:
Hello

We are in the process of migration Service Contract and Customer Project data into SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

However, we still have some doubts on how to migrate these in combination with the revenue recognition.

Example:

A service contract with validity 01/10/2024 to 30/09/2024 is migrated on 1/1/2025. The contract was already invoiced on 01/10/2024. Hence, a part of the revenue was already recognized in the legacy system and also migrated via finance migration.

However, when loading the contract in S/4 and running the revenue recognition again, the revenue is recognized for the months of 2024 as well.

Do you have any procedure on how to handle this migration?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content: Yes, this does work also in Advanced Formulas, something like DATA([d/Date] = %targetMonth%) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = %sourceMonth%)

entry.title: Re: SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI Now Available
entry.content:
Hi Martina

We have a requirement where multiple logon scenarios with and without SSO where end users share a common workstation with single windows AD-based logon but use individual login ID for application logon, As per blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-active-directory-integration-for-shared-workstations/ba-p/13532148 this was achievable with Secure login Server

Does Secure Login Service has the similar feature available?

We understand is Secure Login Server (SLS server) from SAP Single Sign On 3.0 product (out of support from 2027) N.B. download of this application is no longer available as of mid 2024. Secure Login Service must be used instead

Is there any additional license cost involved for Secure Login Service when we already have SAP SSO 3.0 License

How to configure dynamic Email in output parameter determination App

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: LTMOM - Guia rápido para inclusão de campos no template de carga do Migration Cockpit
entry.content: Simplesmente Sensacional! Obrigado por compartilhar!

entry.title: [CPI-Groovy]: Sort XML Nodes based on the start date
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to sort the EmpJob nodes based on start dates only when there is sinlge EmpEmployment node and jobInfoNav has multiple EmpJob nodes which contains emplStatusNav/PicklistOption/localeLabel is Active in the ascending order. Eg. I am expecting EmpJob/startDate = 2024-11-01T00:00:00.000 in the first node and then EmpJob/startDate = 2025-01-01T00:00:00.000 in the second node. The payload contains multiple records, if these conditions are not satisfied there should not be any sorting done to nodes.

I have tried with the below-mentioned code but it is not working.

Any help or suggestions would be highly appreciated.

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
import groovy.xml.XmlUtil;
import groovy.util.NodeList
import groovy.util.XmlParser;
import groovy.xml.MarkupBuilder;
import java.util.Date;
import java.text.SimpleDateFormat;
import java.util.Calendar;

def Message processData(Message message) {
    def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String);
    def payload = new XmlParser().parseText(body);
    
        payload.PerPerson.each{rec ->  
        def countofEmpEmployment = rec.employmentNav.EmpEmployment.size()
        if (countofEmpEmployment <= 1){
            def countofEmpJob = rec.employmentNav.EmpEmployment.jobInfoNav.EmpJob.size();
            def EmpJobStatus = rec.employmentNav.EmpEmployment.jobInfoNav.EmpJob.emplStatusNav.PicklistOption.localeLabel.text()
            if(EmpJobStatus.contains("ActiveActive")){
            rec.value = rec.employmentNav.EmpEmployment.jobInfoNav.EmpJob.sort{sd ->
                    sd.startDate.text()}
            }
        }
    } 
    message.setBody(XmlUtil.serialize(payload));
    return message;
}

Regards,
Pavan

entry.title: SAP Adobe Forms footer after table on each page
entry.content:
Good morning Community,


I have this question that I haven't found a solution for yet:
I have a simple form consisting of a FIRST page (Master Page) and a body that extends over multiple pages if there is more content.

"Prerequisite:

I have a simple table (modeled using subforms) consisting of a header and dynamically related rows, and a final subform which we can call Footer, positioned at the very end of the table. My goal is for this 'footer' to be projected on every page that my form generates. Currently, I only see it on the last page, attached to the end.
Note: I cannot act from the Master Page because based on a condition, I need to display two tables with different layouts. Therefore, I exclude placing the footer at the Master Page level.".

                                                                              MY STRUCTURE

'Page_ref_it' with 'CLICK_IT' (containing my table set to FLOWED)
and below, my Footer (Subform2) set to Static."

OUTPUT FIRST PAGE

 


OUTPUT SECOND/LAST PAGE
As you  can see i get this field only on last page.

I expected that with these settings, I would see two pages, but my 'Footer' is only present at the end of the table, and not on every page of the form.

Can someone help me?

thanks,

Gianni 🙂

entry.title: Reinvite deleted administrator
entry.content:
It´s not possible to invite deleted administrator, because she always gets the information, that her email address is already existing. But we can not find her in the administrator list.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Reinvite deleted administrator
entry.content:
Admins have 2 accounts, one with SAML login which is the admin account and another which is a regular user account.

When admin account gets deleted, the user account with the same email address remains in the system.

 

When the user gets the admin invitation email to his/her email address then opens the registration link, the registration screen will appear with many fields.

At the bottom of the screen there will be an option "Have an account already?" --> "Click Here".

User needs to enter the email address and the password ten a new admin account will be created.

 

Please refer SAP Note 0003449643 - Admin user can't be created

Created parameter

Thanks,

Meghan

entry.title: Chancing Default Output Device in Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi Jocelyn,

We are still using 'old' transactions in the FLP. Is it possible to change the default  'Output Device'  via the Fiori User (Default) Settings in the FLP?  Our users are not able to run t-code SU3 (In the FLP ) anymore.  Is there still an option for them to change this setting?

Thanks

@Jocelyn_Dart

entry.title: Transport Role Collections and Destinations using SAP Content Agent
entry.content:
If you are a BTP Subaccount Administrator, Security Administrator, or Operations Administrator working with BTP destinations or role collections, you may need to replicate setups across other BTP subaccounts or transport these changes seamlessly. In such cases, you can utilize the SAP Content Agent UI.

The Content Agent UI now enables the transport of Role Collections along with custom roles, users, user groups, and destinations from a source account to a target account via the Cloud Transport Management service.

 

Prerequisites
You must have an active subscription to the Content Agent UI and have all the necessary roles assigned.

Configuration in SAP BTP Account
To enable the export of role collections from a source account or import them into a target account, a destination must be configured that points to the service credentials of the SAP Authorization and Trust Management Service with the "apiaccess" plan. You can refer to the help documentation for further information.

Transport of destinations is automatically enabled and requires no manual configuration task.

Note: The Content Agent service does not transport passwords or secrets. Therefore, destinations will have a placeholder value for secrets, which will need to be imported separately after the initial import.

Connectivity Check
Confirm the status of Cloud Transport Management UI and select the desired source node.

Procedure
Use the SAP Content Agent UI from the source account to trigger the export using step by step wizard. Start with selecting the desired role collections and destinations. You can select up to 50. Proceed to the next step.

Recommended transport mode is Cloud Transport Management service for which you have to provide a description. The transport request will also have the same description once created. Proceed to review and the final step will start the asynchronous process. 

You can view the status of the transport request along with messages. 

Result
You have successfully transported the changes to transport Management queue. You can now import the changes into desired target node using destination pointing to SAP Content Agent service. For more details refer to the help document.

entry.title: Configuring Journal Entry Posting Approval from bpa store
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to configure Journal entry Posting approval from Store using template. After deploying ui module into BTP , trying to trigger workflow. But getting 500 internal server error.

Destination for build process automation followed configuration guide. Client id ,client_secret. api , token service url are copied from build process automation service key .

Additional properties of destination follows 

AppgyverEnabled : true

HTML5.DynamicDestination : true

sap.cloud.service :com.sap.spa.processautomation

sap.processautomation.enabled : true

In xs-app.json added destination under routes in below format

 {
        "source": "^/sap_process_automation_service/(.*)$",
        "target": "/$1",
        "service": "com.sap.spa.processautomation",
        "endpoint": "api",
        "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    },

https://api.sap.com/odata/1.0/catalog.svc/Files('40deefdf-0810-440d-a2e6-19a4dcf470bc')/$value

followed above guide. Please refer below screenshot .

Thanks and regards

Saranya

@Archana - Requesting your help on this

entry.title: Re: SAP Crystal Reports for Eclipse v2 EOMM
entry.content:
The products listed for EOMM are marked with the *, CR for Eclipse does not have that mark.

Typically with CR products since they do come out with new versions the dates do get updated to reflect them.

So even though it indicates 2025 it usually means it's simply not been updated.

I'll check with product to confirm, R&D does maintain the Java SDK's for CRS/BOE so not likely going away and I'll get them to update the date if it needs to be.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Create a SQL user with access to multiple spaces in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Hi @albertosimeoni, no, this is not possible for SAP Datasphere SQL users

entry.title: Downloading costs to WBEs belonging to the same project
entry.content:
We have a need to download costs from one WBE to another WBE both belonging to the same project with project profile: Investment Project .This is to be able to offload costs belonging to a lower level WBE to the parent WBE. We tried to create the settlement rule with object tipe WBS, but the ssystem give us this error: Settlement within project hierarchy is not possible.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Downloading costs to WBEs belonging to the same project
entry.content: To transfer costs, please use app Reassign Costs and Revenues.

entry.title: How to Calculate Differences Between Measures from Two Excels in SAC Story Table?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We have two Excel sheets as data sources:

One contains data for the year 2024.
The other contains data for the year 2023.

Both Files include more than 20 measures and multiple dimensions, as shown in the attached Excel file. The measures' names are identical between the two years.(Merging the source files into a single file with the years as a KEY is not an option)

Based on these two files, I want to create an SAC Story table where I can calculate the difference for each measure (e.g., Measure_2024 - Measure_2023) and display the results in the SAC Story tables. 

Since linking or blending 2 models isn't supported for the table widget, I'm unsure how to achieve this.

Can anyone guide me on how to implement this in SAC?

entry.title: Re: CER006 exam attempts payment instructions
entry.content:
Hi Anne - I have booked it from training.sap.com, I later realised the process was incomplete and now I have completed and purchased my exam attempts. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content: Your Target-Box also needs to contain the targetDate Parameter so you specify the context to be written to. Please note that "Level" needs to be set to Leaf in the parameter configuration as it is only allow to write to leaves.

entry.title: Re: Flow function: "Set repeated item value" suddenly not working
entry.content:
Hi @nicholas1959 ,

in my case I found a workaround via 
SET_ITEM_AT( YourList, repeatedInfo.current.index, SET_KEY(item, "YourAttribute", YourValue)) 

Maybe this helps.

entry.title: Re: REST API for SAP Information Steward
entry.content: Are there any updates on this ? I have the same question if Data Insights module has APIs ? I found an article that potentially can be an alternative - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-eim-information-steward-data-quality-scorecard-on-power-bi/ba-p/13934436 but would like to know if there are APIs that would make it simpler.

entry.title: Production Labor cost calculation in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We are following the process industry.

We have a scenario to produce X item 10000 pcs to it will take 1 HR and 10 labors or required

Say for example due to an emergency we wanted to complete the production before 1 hour so we added 5 more laborers and we finished the production in 40 minutes. In such cases, if 2 employees are absent we will manage with 8 laborers that time production time will take more than 1 hr  

The system calculates the cost based on Labor hours, not the number of laborers.

We have mapped the formula labors * number of employees. But still, it is not calculated like that

We have created a labor person separately and tried but still, we are facing the same issue

I have mentioned the calculation with examples in the excel

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Flow function: "Set repeated item value" suddenly not working
entry.content: You mean using a standard "set variable" flow function?

entry.title: Re: Flow function: "Set repeated item value" suddenly not working
entry.content:
Yes, in my case it is a "Set data variable" on the mentioned YourList. 
I guess the "Set repeated item value" does something similar.

entry.title: Re: Synch local dimension members between models
entry.content: @ThomasK this works, thank you. I was also uncertain that subscription is needed.

entry.title: Item 000010 requires exactly 2 serial numbers for the asset. Error Msg IO 206
entry.content:
I have a serial number profile with HUSL usage as "None," i.e. 01. While creating an inbound delivery and packing, the system gives an error message: "Item 000010 requires exactly xx serial numbers for the asset."

The serial number profile setting is None for HUSL.

I appreciate any help you can provide.

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content: Ok, i did it but appeared this error

entry.title: Delta Accrual not Calculating Amounts
entry.content:
Hallo All

I am creating a delta accrual for a condition contract and when the settlement document is created the condition type that are supposed to be filled with the accrual values are showing a value of zero.

The condition type for volume determination correctly gets the total volume but others are showing zero.For example, ZEXB which is a copy of RES1 does not return a value for the same access which has been used to create the condition contract.

In this case a combination of Contract,Sales Org, Dist Channel and Plant was used in the master data but when I create the settlement document the value for plant is not determined.

What configuration could I have missed? I have gone through the documnetation in Note 2535889 for my relevant version

Please assist with resolution of this issue.  

1. Condition Contract Master Data

2. Settlement Document Header 

3. Settlement Document Pricing Analysis

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content: Alright, I’ve set the correct hierarchy, and now there are no errors. I’m going to test it out.

entry.title: Re: Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition | 2023 FPS02 Release
entry.content:
Thanks Gerhard!

Again detailed and helpful blog!

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content: Please select a specific hierarchy in the parameter configuration (I assume it is currently set to "Any"). Otherwise the system cannot determine the hierarchy to use for value help.

entry.title: Manage Customer Hierarchies - Import customer Hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

We  are seeking a method to bulk upload customer hierarchy, but we are unable to locate this option under the 'Import Hierarchy' feature in the 'Manage Global Hierarchy' app. Could you please confirm if it is possible to import customer hierarchy?"

Thank you,

Jyoti


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Manage Customer Hierarchies - Import customer Hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi Jyothi,

The functionalities of the application "Manage Global Hierarchies" are mentioned in the Help portal below. I kindly request you to go through it, as it has also been explained in the video. 

Manage Global Hierarchies | SAP Help Portal

If the "Upload Customer Hierarchy" option under the 'Import Hierarchy' feature is not available, I kindly request you to submit a feature request for the same.

Paul Schropp

entry.title: WBS Field need to be editable when User status is ZWCN.
entry.content:
Hi All.

in CJ20N

i have a project.

for the particular project  when user status ZWCN is not active, then WBS element field need to editable

If user status is ZWCN then WBS field is non editable.

the problem is, When user status is not ZWCN still the WBS element is non editable,

How to resolve this issue, and how to make it editable,

please help me to resolve this,

if there anu any standard exits please mention them.

And if any custom enhancement , please give a path to how to find them.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Why is Hungarian Notation Harmful?
entry.content:
@rosenpetrov

1) Why do you need distinction t/v? For example you see such code: LOOP AT items INTO item. From this you clearly see, what is table and what not.

2) If you follow other rules of clean code (the more important ones), you don't need the l/g/m indicators.

Every time you feel a bit lost and you think "hey, I need prefixes to understand the code" you should refactor your code. This thought is a clear sign of code smell, which should be eliminated.
